## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on Windows (bash)
- [ ] Tested on Mac/Linux
- [ ] Updated installers (`install.sh`, `install.ps1`, `bin/cli.js`, `uninstall.sh`)
- [ ] Updated README if adding new skill/rule/hook
- [ ] Added credit comment (`<!-- Skill by Name | claude-code-optimizer -->`)
- [ ] Skills with side effects have `disable-model-invocation: true`
- [ ] Exploration skills use `context: fork`
